overview: A sales enablement knowledge platform for Liquid Instruments Moku products. Before approaching any company, get trained on their domain, pain areas, and how Moku Go/Pro/Delta solve their problems — then generate courses, schematics, and presentation outlines on demand via an AI advisor.
features: AI chat advisor for domain-specific Moku solution recommendations
Product knowledge base for Moku Go, Moku Pro, and Moku Delta
Industry vertical profiles with pain areas and solution mappings
Generate training course outlines for any domain
Generate system schematics and signal flow diagrams
Full-text search across products, verticals, and use cases
Dashboard with quick-access tiles for top verticals and recent queries
